title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Hotel Manager at Jubilant FoodWorks
jsonLd.description:
Jubilant FoodWorks is actively seeking a talented and motivated Hotel Manager to join our dynamic team in Bhubaneswar. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jubilant FoodWorks:
Jubilant FoodWorks is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in HACCP

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jubilant FoodWorks!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
